mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM plan p LEFT OUTER JOIN item i on p.plan_item = i.item_id WHERE plan_usage = 'Y'
AND p.plan_edate <= TO_DATE(#{planSearchSdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.plan_sdate <= TO_DATE(#{planSearchEdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.plan_status = #{searchType}
AND ( UPPER(p.plan_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) or UPPER(p.plan_item) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) or UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) )
AND (
p.plan_status = 20
p.plan_status = 10
p.plan_status = 30
p.plan_status = 40
p.plan_status = 0
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn, plan.* FROM ( SELECT p.plan_id planId, p.plan_item planItem, i.item_name planItemName, i.item_unit planItemUnit, p.plan_fin_qty planFinQty, p.plan_wp_qty planWpQty, p.plan_sdate planSdate, p.plan_edate planEdate, p.plan_status planStatus, p.plan_director planDirector, d.emp_name planDname, p.plan_cdate planCdate, p.plan_mdate planMdate FROM plan p LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON d.emp_id = p.plan_director WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y'
AND p.plan_edate >= TO_DATE(#{planDTO.planSearchSdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.plan_sdate <= TO_DATE(#{planDTO.planSearchEdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.plan_status = #{planDTO.searchType}
AND ( UPPER(p.plan_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{planDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(p.plan_item) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{planDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{planDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) )
AND (
p.plan_status = 20
p.plan_status = 10
p.plan_status = 30
p.plan_status = 40
p.plan_status = 0
)
ORDER BY CASE p.plan_status WHEN 40 THEN 1 WHEN 20 THEN 2 WHEN 10 THEN 3 WHEN 30 THEN 4 WHEN 0 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, CASE WHEN p.plan_status IN (40, 20, 10) THEN p.plan_edate END ASC, CASE WHEN p.plan_status IN (30, 0) THEN p.plan_edate END DESC, p.plan_id DESC ) plan WHERE rownum <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_status = 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ingCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_status = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waitCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_status = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_status = 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS delayCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN p.plan_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS etcCnt FROM plan p LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y'
AND p.plan_edate >= TO_DATE(#{planSearchSdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND p.plan_sdate <= TO_DATE(#{planSearchEdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( UPPER(p.plan_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(p.plan_item) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan ( plan_id, plan_item, plan_fin_qty, plan_wp_qty, plan_sdate, plan_edate, plan_dmsg, plan_status, plan_director, plan_cdate, plan_usage ) VALUES ( 'PLAN' || plan_seq.nextval, #{planItem}, #{planFinQty}, 0, #{planSdate}, #{planEdate}, #{planDmsg}, 10, #{planDirector}, sysdate + (9/24), 'Y' )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.plan_id planId, p.plan_item planItem, i.item_type planItemType, i.item_name planItemName, i.item_unit planItemUnit, p.plan_fin_qty planFinQty, p.plan_wp_qty planWpQty,
NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN wo.work_status IN (10, 20, 30) THEN wo.work_prev_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) planWorkingQty, p.plan_sdate planSdate, p.plan_edate planEdate, p.plan_director planDirector, e.emp_name planDname, p.plan_cdate planCdate, p.plan_mdate planMdate, p.plan_dmsg planDmsg, p.plan_status planStatus FROM plan p LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp e ON p.plan_director = e.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN work wo ON p.plan_id = wo.work_plan WHERE p.plan_id = #{planId} AND p.plan_usage = 'Y' GROUP BY p.plan_id, p.plan_item, i.item_type, i.item_name, i.item_unit, p.plan_fin_qty, p.plan_wp_qty, p.plan_sdate, p.plan_edate, p.plan_director, e.emp_name, p.plan_cdate, p.plan_mdate, p.plan_dmsg, p.plan_status

SELECT w.work_id workId, w.work_plan workPlan, w.work_order_qty workOrderQty, w.work_prev_qty workPrevQty, w.work_date workDate, w.work_director workDirector, d.emp_name workDname, w.work_worker workWorker, worker.emp_name workWname, w.work_dmsg workDmsg, w.work_wmsg workWmsg, w.work_status workStatus, w.work_cdate workCdate, w.work_mdate workMdate FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id WHERE w.work_plan = #{planId} ORDER BY CASE w.work_status WHEN 20 THEN 1 WHEN 10 THEN 2 WHEN 30 THEN 3 WHEN 50 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END ASC, w.work_date ASC, w.work_id ASC
